current_state.description: What the system does today — key behaviors, components, and what depends on them

frozen_surface.description: Contracts intentionally preserved — existing callers depend on these and they cannot break

change_surface.description: Behaviors intentionally changing — current behavior, target behavior, what breaks, and why the change is necessary

migration_path.description: Ordered steps with gates — what must be true before each step starts and the rollback boundary per step

regression_risk.description: Where existing behavior could silently break — area, trigger, failure mode (silent vs loud), and existing guard if any

open_questions.description: Blocking unknowns that would change the frozen/change surface or migration order if answered
